comments.author: RebarBotNava
comments.body: Fix pushed as Gerrit change 460 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/460). All 3 stale external tests updated (sys.path for ref-lock; single_turn for text_mode; enable gate for review_code). Verified live: text_mode + review_code GREEN against the real model; ref-lock import resolves. Awaiting votes.

compiled_state.description:
## Summary

With the ALLOW_MODEL_REQUESTS session-guard fix landed (Gerrit 442), the external
'external integration (live services)' job now runs its live tests (17 pass) instead of
failing every one at the model call. That unmasked 3 pre-existing failures — tests not
updated for src design changes landed after the suite last passed (2026-06-16):

1. **test_ref_lock_ac0_live.py::test_ac0_blob_ref_roundtrips_through_real_origin** —
   `ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'rebar_reconciler'` at _ref_lock.py:249. The test
   loads _ref_lock.py by file path and never puts src/rebar/_engine on sys.path; the
   reconciler git-op refactor (d9e0f0e7, 2026-07-07) added `from rebar_reconciler import
   git_adapter`. Sibling external tests already add ENGINE_DIR to sys.path.

2. **test_pydantic_ai_cutover_live.py::test_pydantic_text_mode** — `RuntimeError: agentic
   filesystem tools attempted OUTSIDE the repo-snapshot gate` (config.py:228). The
   direct-runner RunRequest defaults to execution_mode='agentic', which trips the
   snapshot-gate safeguard added in b25fafcd1 (2026-06-27). A text reply needs no fs tools.

3. **test_pydantic_ai_cutover_live.py::test_pydantic_review_code** — `assert
   'code-review-disabled' == 'pydantic_ai'`. review_code became an off-by-default 4-pass
   gate (2d3e7611a, 2026-07-01); the old assertion tests a removed contract. Decision:
   enable the gate and validate the live gated path (runner == 'code-review-gate').

All three are test-only fixes (no src defect); confined to test_ref_lock_ac0_live.py and
test_pydantic_ai_cutover_live.py.

## Reproduction Steps

1. Trigger the external-integration workflow (external job) on main.
2. Observe: 3 failed, 17 passed, 8 skipped — the 3 failures above.

Expected: the external job is green.
Actual: 3 stale live tests fail.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] test_ref_lock_ac0_live puts src/rebar/_engine on sys.path so `from rebar_reconciler import ...` resolves (mirrors sibling external tests).
- [ ] test_pydantic_text_mode runs the text path without tripping the snapshot gate (execution_mode='single_turn' — text needs no fs tools).
- [ ] test_pydantic_review_code enables verify.enable_code_review and asserts the live gated path (runner == 'code-review-gate', findings is a list).
- [ ] Verified end-to-end: the external-integration GitHub Action's external job runs green.
compiled_state.title: external suite: 3 live tests stale after post-06-16 design changes (unmasked by the ALLOW_MODEL_REQUESTS fix)
